analyst_observations: The skill excels at its core use case (prompt improvement) — eval 3 (landing-page-prompt) scored 100% on all assertions with a highly specific, personalized output
The skill HURTS for specific technical brainstorming — eval 2 user wanted strategies, got an 'Improved Prompt' instead. Baseline gave immediate actionable advice
The skill is overkill for casual requests — eval 1 used 11 questions and 162s for a casual 'help me think' request. Baseline gave 15 ideas in 52s
No adaptive complexity — all 7 phases are forced regardless of request type or specificity
Output format is rigid — always 'Improved Prompt + Discovery Summary' even when user wants ideas/strategies directly
Tool names are wrong — uses ask_user instead of AskUserQuestion, web_search instead of WebSearch
The skill adds ~10K tokens and ~100s overhead per invocation compared to baseline
